title: hieracium submedianum
intro: Hieracium submedianum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as a type of hawkweed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium submedianum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the healing of wounds. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, and it can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
